text: Very nice 2 tone necklace.  Great length to wear with tunics

Inspired by the reflection of the moon on the surface of the sea, it shimmers with positive energy when you wear it. Alloy metals include steel and copper that are gently hammered in the circles. Chain is 30" LONG which creates a wonderful jazzy look with any outfit. Handmade Sterling silver long chain Gently hammered metals']

text: Simple but strong!! Love pictures and quotes
description: ['UNFRAMED PRINTS', '- I have to put this in for the people that don\'t read the words Unframed Print in the title. Of course if they didn\'t read the title or the words on the pictures they probably won\'t read this LOL. We tried. It\'s a print. It\'s not printed on wood, stone, slate, matboard, or any other kind of substrate. It\'s not thick sign, it\'s a print. It\'s not framed. That\'s why every picture says "Frame not Include". If you did read this far, Thank You', 'MAKES A GREAT GIFT', "- My huge portfolio makes it easy to find the perfect gift for the people you care about. Friends love to get them for Birthdays, Christmas, Hanukkah, weddings, anniversaries, retirement, graduation, Father's Day, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day or house warming. Makes a great gift for your friends, husband, wife, son daughter mom, dad, co-workers, grandfather, grandmother, aunt uncle, cousin, spouse, or boss", 'PERFECT FOR ANY ROOM', '- They look great in living rooms, dens, bedrooms, kitchens, entries, dining rooms, bathrooms, offices, man-caves, she sheds, home bars, game rooms, dorms or garages', 'READY TO FRAME', '- You get four 8"x 10" prints. 8" x 10" frames are super easy to buy here on Amazon or at any department or craft store. Choose the frames that work with your decor and the print!', 'MADE TO LAST', '- This print is printed on semi-matte Fuji Crystal Archive paper to last a lifetime.', 'PROUDLY MADE IN THE USA', '- All of my designs are printed here in the good-old USA and packages at our studio in Tomball, TX by a hard-working group of employees that still care about producing quality products', 'LOVE IT OR SEND IT BACK', "- It's pretty simple, love it or we'll gladly take it back. That's it!", 'WANT TO SEE MORE?', '- Look for the link "Personalized Signs by Lone Star Art" right under the title to see all of my collection.']

text: So perfect! Exactly what I was needing. I remember my mom having a towel on the stove handle with a built in holder. I was so excited to find this so I can hang my decor towels.
description: ['Functional and soft, these towel hangers are a great way to conveniently display your kitchen towels while allowing you to remove the towels for laundering. Great for every day use as well as displaying those special seasonal towels.  Hang them from your stove, refrigerator handle, dishwasher, or anywhere that you may need.  Simply unbutton your towel hanger, wrap around the handle you wish to display it on and button back. place the towel in the ring at the bottom. The ring is designed to accommodate a wide variety of sizes of kitchen and hand towels.  Each towel holder is made from acrylic yarn, acrylic ring and a little wood button, proudly displaying that the item is "Handmade with Love". The towel holder is approximately 10.5 inches tall when open and 7 inches tall when buttoned. The ring section of the towel holder is 3.75 inches across. To care for your holder simple wash in cold water with like colors and line or tumble dry.']
product_title: Crochet Hanging Dish Towel Holder (Heather Grey)

text: I love this ring so much! I got my sons name engraved on it and wear it on my thumb everyday.
description: ['New to our product line are these nice Stainless Steel Stackable Name Rings, they are available in Matte, Shiny, Rose Gold, Gold and Coffee colors Stainless Steel. Each ring is personalized with your choice of wording and/or dates. The rings are made of Stainless Steel that will not fade, tarnish or stain your skin. Rose Gold, Gold and Coffee colors are plated over Stainless Steel. Each ring is 3mm wide, the perfect width for stacking! **LISTING IS FOR 1 RING** ( Picture shows five individual rings which are sold separately) Change Quantity to desired number of rings and add to cart separately ****INSIDE ENGRAVING NOT AVAILABLE FOR THIS RING**** ------------ORDERING INSTRUCTIONS--------------- 1. Select Quantity 2. Select Color3. Select Size 4. Enter personalization (35 characters max.) **Please note: Paint in rings is not permanent and will come out over time, length will vary depending on wear of ring. This can easily be repainted at any time using a paint marker and wiping excess with alcohol. Unfortunately, there is not a way to make it permanent in stainless steel, however the engraving (stamping) will always be there**']

text: I brought 2 for my sons Minecraft room and they love them. Definitely gotta choose the right size I got both of them in  36”wide x 18” tall and it was a pretty big size. You have to take your time with peeling off the transfer paper from the wall I used a credit card to help with peeling the sword off the transfer paper. Before putting them up I laid mines on the floor when I took them out the box and put something a little heavy around the border for about 2 hours to straighten it out a little since it comes rolled up. I had my husband help with peeling the transfer paper and sword with the name on it off the back sheet and he helped me place it on the wall since it was a lot bigger than I expected but I’m glad I got it that size. Shipping was actually fast considering that it’s  customized. Packaging was great as well
description: ['IMAGE SHOWN for display purpose only. See size options from the menu to pick the size you want. Size is an estimate and will be as close as possible depending on length of name to be personalized. Full written and video instructions are included.', 'Our customized wall decal is the perfect addition to any room. You will receive one elegant made to order wall decal for one low price. The decal colors are a matte finish which will look like a painted on wall mural once applied. Please choose the color of the sword as text is cut out and will be your surface color. Your friends and family will envy your home and you with this wonderfully designed decal. The decal can be applied to slightly textured or smooth walls and can be applied to any type of smooth surface such as glass, mirror, finished wood, canvas, etc. Easy application and video tutorial instructions are included. Our DIY decal comes ready to apply with application tape intact for easy setup. Basic colors are available. Other specialty colors can be made. Please contact us for details.', 'We use Oracal brand indoor vinyl. It is specifically made for indoor use and will not damage walls and can last up to 7 years. It is easy to remove by just peeling it off when done, but cannot be reused. It is a great way to decorate when you are unable to paint such as apartments as it will not damage walls when removed.', 'Looking for something else? Email me anytime and I can create a decal specifically for you! All products are made right here in the USA. Copyright and Trademark by WallPressions.']
